who: contract managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 contracts/month
offer: For contract managers in accounting firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, missed compliance milestones cause supplier penalties. We provide compliance alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking contract compliance milestones leading to potential penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities focused on contract management
Indie Hackers discussions about compliance tools
DM outreach to contract managers with demo video
Participate in forums for contract management solutions
try_it: Let users try monthly compliance milestone alerts on 1-3 contracts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding to first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Pre-set reminder schedules for compliance checks
Allow CSV import for existing contract data
Enable one-click export of compliance reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
